settings.text_1: PERFECT FOR HOME, OFFICE & TRAVEL: Compact size (30cm x 16cm) fits in any bag. Tone your arms during TV time, work breaks, or whenever you have a spare moment.

settings.heading: Why People Love The 360° Arm Trainer
settings.content:
Most arm exercises are either boring or require a lot of space and equipment. The 360° Rotating Wrist & Forearm Trainer is different — its centrifugal spinning motion naturally engages your biceps, triceps, and shoulders while feeling more like play than a workout.

The built-in LCD display tracks your revolutions, calories burned, and time across 3 modes, so you always know exactly how hard you worked. Whether you use it at home watching TV, at your desk during a break, or while traveling, this compact trainer fits your lifestyle.

With consistent use, users notice reduced armpit fat, more defined arm muscles, and improved upper body tone — without ever stepping foot in a gym.

settings.heading: What Muscles Does It Target
settings.content:
The 360° rotating motion engages the complete upper arm and shoulder muscle group:

  • Biceps - the front of your upper arm, responsible for the toned look most people want
  • Triceps - the back of the upper arm, the area most prone to stubborn flabbiness
  • Shoulders (Deltoids) - all three heads of the shoulder for rounded, sculpted definition
  • Forearm Muscles - wrist flexors and extensors engaged throughout the rotation movement
  • Upper Back Stabilizers - supporting muscles activated to maintain posture during the exercise

settings.heading: How to Use
settings.content:
Step 1: Slip the arm cuff onto your wrist or hold it in your hand
Step 2: Select your preferred mode on the LCD display
Step 3: Begin rotating your arm in smooth circular motions, letting the centrifugal force build momentum

Best used for 5-15 minute sessions, 1-2 times daily. Alternate arms for balanced toning. The LCD will track your progress so you can set daily goals and improve over time.

settings.post_text: i've been using this for a month and my arms look completely different. the flabby part under my arm is visibly smaller and i can actually feel muscle there now. i use it while watching netflix every night for like 10-15 minutes. the LCD screen tracking my calories makes it feel like a little game. so addictive in the best way.

bought this after seeing it on social media and honestly it exceeded my expectations. i was skeptical that something this small and fun-looking could actually work, but after 3 weeks i genuinely noticed more definition in my arms. i use it at my desk between meetings. it doesn't take up any space and the pink color is so cute. would 100% recommend.

gave one to my mom and she loves it. she's 58 and was worried about arm jiggle but didn't want to lift weights. this is perfect for her because it feels gentle but you can still feel it working. she does it for a few minutes while drinking her morning coffee. after 6 weeks her arms look noticeably firmer. buying a second one for myself now.

settings.heading: How does the 360° arm trainer actually work?
settings.row_content: It uses centrifugal force generated by the rotating mechanism. As you spin the arm cuff in circular motions, the momentum creates resistance that engages your biceps, triceps, and shoulder muscles. The faster and more controlled your rotation, the greater the muscle activation — similar to how a gyroscope creates resistance through inertia.

settings.heading: Will this actually help with arm fat and flabbiness?
settings.row_content: Yes, with consistent daily use. The rotational resistance targets the muscles underneath the fat — primarily the triceps and shoulders — helping to tone and firm the area over time. Most users notice visible differences within 3-6 weeks of regular use. Results improve when combined with a balanced diet.

settings.heading: What do the 3 LCD modes do?
settings.row_content: The built-in LCD display tracks your workout data across 3 training modes. Each mode monitors a different combination of revolutions, elapsed time, and estimated calories burned — letting you set goals, track progress, and challenge yourself to improve session by session.

settings.heading: Is it suitable for older adults or beginners?
settings.row_content: Absolutely. The centrifugal motion is low-impact and joint-friendly, making it suitable for a wide age range including seniors. Beginners can start with short 5-minute sessions at a slow pace and gradually increase as they build strength and confidence.

settings.heading: What are the dimensions and weight?
settings.row_content: Size: 30cm x 16cm (11.81" x 6.3"). Weight: 1.21 lbs (0.55 kg). It is compact and lightweight enough to use at your desk, on the couch, or pack in a travel bag. Battery: button battery (included).

settings.heading: What colors are available?
settings.row_content: Available in White A, White B, Pink A, and Pink B. All variants feature the same premium polycarbonate build and LCD tracking functionality — the difference is in the color finish and style of each option.

settings.heading: What if I'm not happy with my results?
settings.row_content: We offer a 90-day money-back guarantee. If you use it consistently and are not satisfied with your experience for any reason, reach out to our team and we will make it right — no questions asked.
